description.value: Aura strong conjuration; CL 15th; Weight 4 lbs.; Price 73,300 gp DESCRIPTION An infinity symbol is engraved on both sides of this +5 pistol’s mother of pearl grip, and the barrel is adorned with gold depicting the moon, planets, and stars against a night sky of the pistol’s cold black steel. This pistol never needs to be reloaded. After one shot is fired, a bullet and powder magically appear in the chamber. This ammunition never suffers a misfire. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells reloading hands; Cost 37,300 gp
